title: BEM-840 execute missing proof
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_result_probe_codex.yml.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 prove dispatch result writer after BEM-839','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='queued_dispatch_result_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 prove Claude runtime state after dispatch proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='queued_claude_runtime_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime-state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_response_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 request real Claude response after runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='queued_claude_response_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'bem839_status':prev.get('status'),'missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_read_839_and_execute_missing_proof.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_read_839_and_execute_missing_proof.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Read BEM-839 And Execute Missing Proof | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_read_839_and_execute_missing_proof.json','governance/reports/bem840_read_839_and_execute_missing_proof.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Read BEM-839 verification and queued the probe for the first missing proof')
"""
